name: Insta360 Studio
description: Desktop editing software for Insta360 camera footage

changelog.field: release_note in items JSON (HTML formatted changelog per version)

notes: Main download page is Cloudflare-protected (403 to automated fetchers). The openapi.insta360.com API works fine programmatically with no protection. app_id=38 identifies Insta360 Studio within the legacy 'insta360-go2' group endpoint. Since v5.7.0 downloads use wassets.insta360.com with .zip format; older versions used file.insta360.com with .pkg.
